misc: Known for deliberating his next shot for a long time, leading to somewhat slow play
biography: Panu is a golfer known for his meticulous approach to the game. He has a reputation for deliberating over each shot, sometimes to the chagrin of fellow players due to the resulting slow pace of play.

While details of Panu's home club remain undisclosed, his presence has certainly been felt at the Hector Trophée. He has participated in the tournament on three occasions, securing one victory. Although he has never won the Victor Trophy, his skills are undeniable.

Currently considered retired from Hector Trophée events, Panu's competitive spirit may yet draw him back to the tournament in the future. For now, however, it appears that he will not be participating in 2026.
